prompt: Implement Phase 5: Issue Hierarchy. Read the specification at .agentic/specs/08-phase5-hierarchy-spec.md for complete details. Summary: (1) Add addChild/removeChild/getChildren to index-manager.ts. (2) Create src/core/hierarchy.ts with constraint validation functions (validateNewChild, validateParentStatusChange, getClosableChildren, computeUpwardPromotions). (3) Add HIERARCHY_CONSTRAINT error code (exit 12) to errors.ts. (4) Integrate hierarchy into Tracker.create() — validate parent exists and not closed, update childrenOf. (5) Integrate into Tracker.update() — downward cascade on close, upward auto-promotion on status advance, reparenting logic on parentId change. (6) Write comprehensive tests. No CLI changes needed — --parentId already supported. See the spec for all details including test cases, implementation order, and exit criteria.

response_preview:
All quality gates pass. Let me provide a summary of what was implemented:

## Phase 5: Issue Hierarchy — Implementation Complete

### Changes Summary

**New files:**
1. **`src/core/hierarchy.ts`** — Hierarchy constraint validation module with:
   - `isStatusAfter()` — compares two statuses against the progression order
   - `validateNewChild()` — checks if a parent can accept a new child (blocks closed parents)
   - `validateParentStatusChange()` — blocks parent from moving to done/closed if chi
